title: Buffer overflow check after lora_recv already wrote to buffer
description: lora_l2.c:191-194 — Check 'ret > sizeof(rx_buf)' occurs AFTER lora_recv at line 167 already wrote data. If driver misbehaves and writes >255 bytes, overflow already occurred. Defense-in-depth gap.
close_reason: Added BUILD_ASSERT for buffer size and improved error logging
